# metadataVersion

**Instance Property**

An opaque object used to track versions of the item’s metadata.

## Declaration

```swift
var metadataVersion: Data { get }
```

## Discussion

When the [doc://com.apple.fileprovider/documentation/FileProvider/NSFileProviderItemVersion/metadataVersion] changes, system updates the dataless representation of the item on disk, but it doesn’t attempt to download the content.

The version data object must be no longer than 128 bytes.

## Accessing Version Data

- **beforeFirstSyncComponent**: A Boolean value indicating that this version predates the version returned by the file provider extension.
- **contentVersion**: An opaque object used to track versions of the item’s content.
